name: Port Canaveral
description: The second-busiest cruise port in the world, handling over 5 million passengers annually. Home port for Carnival, Royal Caribbean, Disney, Norwegian, MSC, and Virgin Voyages.

name: Port Tampa Bay
description: Tampa Bay's cruise port serving Carnival, Royal Caribbean, and Celebrity cruise lines. Located on the Ybor Channel with easy access from downtown Tampa.

name: Port Everglades
description: One of the top three cruise ports in the world, located in Fort Lauderdale. Home port for multiple cruise lines with easy access from FLL airport.
